text.title: Prototype Iteration Log Template Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema (draft-07) pinning the shape of a valid artefact, plus one valid example, one invalid example, and a closed list of forbidden patterns the validator rejects.

list.pattern: hypothesis text does not contain 'IF' AND 'THEN'.
outcome value not in {kept, rolled-back, shipped-with-changes}.
owner is a plural pronoun or empty.

example.code: { "artefact_id": "prototype-iteration-log-template-example", "owner": "@solo-founder", "version": "1.0.0", "last_reviewed": "2026-05-23", "row_id": "row_id value", "flow_name": "flow_name value", "problem": "problem value", "hypothesis": "hypothesis value", "variant": "variant value", "evidence_link": "evidence_link value", "outcome": "kept", "next": "next value" }
example.note: Minimum viable conformant output — every required field present, no forbidden pattern matched.
Invalid — required fields missing OR forbidden patterns matched (e.g. version not semver).
